baseline.observed: run_scan returned warnings in JSON/stdout, but render_markdown did not include them in saved Markdown exports.

baseline.risk: A limited or partial scan export could be read later without the warning that the result was intentionally bounded or partially degraded.

red_test.result: FAILED before implementation with a render_markdown arity compile error because warnings were not part of the renderer contract.

change.summary: render_markdown now accepts scan warnings and writes a Warnings section when warnings are present.

verification.result: PASS: Markdown file contained ## Warnings and the configured-limit warning.
PASS: Vite build, 26 library tests, 13 CLI tests, and strict clippy passed.

safety_controls: Started with a renderer contract test.
Kept the behavior additive: Markdown gets warnings only when warnings exist.
Removed the temporary smoke export after verification.
